args.query: Reading Festival 2026 age policy under 16 adult accompaniment official

args.reason: To compare the attendee's age on the Reading Festival 2026 event date with the festival's age and accompaniment rules.

content.content:
content: "# Web Document\n\n## Metadata\n\n- title: Festival Republic Ltd \u2013 2026\
  \ Ticket Terms & Conditions \u2013 Reading Festival\n- url: https://media.ticketmaster.co.uk/tm/en-gb/img/static/pdf/2026/event/Reading_2026_Ticket_Terms_and_Conditions.pdf\n\
  - source: Festival Republic / Ticketmaster\n- domain: media.ticketmaster.co.uk\n\
  \n## Content\n\nFESTIVAL REPUBLIC LTD \u2013 2026 TICKET TERMS & CONDITIONS \u2013\
  \ READING FESTIVAL\n\nGENERAL\n\nThese terms and conditions apply to Reading Festival\
  \ 2026 and should be read together with the terms or rules of the official ticket\
  \ agent from which a ticket was purchased. Possession of a ticket constitutes acceptance\
  \ of the event terms.\n\nFestival Republic may make reasonable restrictions or conditions\
  \ before and during the event to ensure safety. This can include closing entrance\
  \ or exit gates or changing published opening times. Attendees must follow instructions\
  \ given by event staff and stewards. Event details and performance schedules may\
  \ change, and the terms may also be amended by posting an updated version to the\
  \ event website.\n\nREFUNDS\n\nRefunds are considered only where the event is cancelled\
  \ in full and not rescheduled, or where the event is materially altered. Changes\
  \ to the line-up, weather conditions, individual artists, set lengths, performance\
  \ times, or delays are not treated as material alterations. Refund requests must\
  \ be made through the point of purchase within the stated period.\n\nAGE POLICY\n\
  \nAll under 16s must be accompanied by an adult ticket holder aged 18 or over. The\
  \ adult must remain on site throughout the weekend as the under-16 attendee's guardian.\
  \ No unaccompanied under 16s are allowed on site.\n\nChildren aged 12 and under\
  \ are admitted free but must be accompanied by a paying ticket holder aged 18 or\
  \ over at all times. Wristbands for a contact mobile number are available for children\
  \ aged 12 and under. Attendees bringing a child aged 12 or under should bring proof\
  \ of age because event staff may request it.\n\nAdults are responsible for deciding\
  \ an appropriate supervision ratio for under-18s, taking account of age, needs,\
  \ abilities, the nature of the event, and relevant safeguarding and health-and-safety\
  \ guidance. Festival Republic does not act in a parental or supervisory capacity\
  \ for under-18s on site.\n\nUnder-18s may not bring alcohol onto the site or purchase\
  \ alcohol there. The event operates a Challenge 25 policy for alcohol sales.\n\n\
  TICKETS AND WRISTBANDS\n\nTickets may be resold only through the official resale\
  \ platform of the official ticket agent from which they were purchased. Tickets\
  \ from unauthorised sources may be invalid and admission may be refused.\n\nTickets\
  \ must be exchanged for a wristband on first entry. Wristbands are non-transferable\
  \ and must be worn for the duration of the event. Tickets must be valid, presented\
  \ using the authorised agent's delivery method, and must not be altered or tampered\
  \ with. Each ticket has a unique barcode; if a barcode has been duplicated, only\
  \ the first scan will be admitted.\n"
metadata: {}
title: "Festival Republic Ltd \u2013 2026 Ticket Terms & Conditions \u2013 Reading\
  \ Festival"
url: https://media.ticketmaster.co.uk/tm/en-gb/img/static/pdf/2026/event/Reading_2026_Ticket_Terms_and_Conditions.pdf

You **do not need an adult to accompany you**. You will be **16 on the event date (28 August 2026)**, and Reading Festival’s 2026 terms require an adult ticket holder aged 18+ only for **attendees under 16**.

Note: The festival says adults are responsible for deciding appropriate supervision for under-18s, so you may still choose to attend with an adult. citeturn0search0

final_answer:
You **do not need an adult to accompany you**. You will be **16 on the event date (28 August 2026)**, and Reading Festival’s 2026 terms require an adult ticket holder aged 18+ only for **attendees under 16**.

Note: The festival says adults are responsible for deciding appropriate supervision for under-18s, so you may still choose to attend with an adult. citeturn0search0
